entries.source: We may amend Terms at any time by posting the amended terms on this site. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of the Platform following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you. By continuing to access or use our Service after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use Service.
entries.value: Mu na iya amend Terms at any lokaci ta posting the amended terms a kan this site. Shi ne naka responsibility don bita these Terms periodically. naka continued amfani da na the dandali following the posting na revised Terms means that kai accept da agree don the canje-canje. kai suna expected don bincika this shafi frequently don haka kai suna aware na any canje-canje, as su suna binding a kan kai. ta continuing don samun dama ko amfani da namu Service bayan any revisions become effective, kai agree don be bound ta the revised terms. If kai kada a agree don the sabo terms, kai suna no longer authorized don amfani da Service.

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. Business Transaction: If our subsidiaries or we are involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, your Personal Data may be transferred. Other cases. We may disclose your information also: to our subsidiaries and affiliates; to contractors, service providers, and other third parties we use to support our business; to fulfil the purpose for which you provide it; to include your company’s logo on our website; for any other purpose disclosed by us when you provide the information; with your consent in any other cases; if we believe disclosure is necessary or appropriate to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Company, our customers, or others.
entries.value: Mu na iya disclose bayanan sirri that mu collect, ko kai provide: Disclosure don Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, mu na iya be ana buƙata don disclose naka bayanai if ana buƙata don do don haka ta law ko a cikin response don valid requests ta na jama’a authorities. Business Transaction: If namu subsidiaries ko mu suna involved a cikin a merger, acquisition ko asset sale, naka bayanan sirri na iya be transferred. Other cases. mu na iya disclose naka information also: don namu subsidiaries da affiliates; don contractors, service providers, da other third parties mu amfani da don tallafi namu business; don fulfil the purpose don wacce kai provide it; don haɗa naka company’s logo a kan namu website; don any other purpose disclosed ta mu lokacin da kai provide the information; tare da naka consent a cikin any other cases; if mu believe disclosure shi ne necessary ko appropriate don protect the haƙƙoƙi, property, ko safety na the Company, namu customers, ko others.

entries.source: We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service on our behalf, perform Service-related services or assist us in analysing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.
entries.value: Mu na iya employ third party companies da individuals don facilitate namu Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service a kan namu behalf, perform Service-mai alaƙa services ko assist mu a cikin analysing yadda namu Service shi ne an yi amfani da. Waɗannan third parties have samun dama don naka bayanan sirri only don perform these tasks a kan namu behalf da suna obligated not don disclose ko amfani da it don any other purpose.

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.
entries.value: Mu na iya provide paid products da/or services within Service. a cikin that case, mu amfani da third-party services don biyan kuɗi processing (e.g. biyan kuɗi processors). mu zai not store ko collect naka biyan kuɗi card details. Wannan information shi ne provided directly don namu third-party biyan kuɗi processors whose amfani da na naka bayanan sirri shi ne governed ta nasu manufar sirri. Waɗannan biyan kuɗi processors adhere don the standards saita ta PCI-DSS as managed ta the PCI tsaro Standards Council, wacce shi ne a joint effort na brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express da Discover. PCI-DSS requirements taimako ensure the secure handling na biyan kuɗi information.

entries.source: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using Service. All provisions of Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.
entries.value: Mu na iya terminate ko suspend naka asusu da bar samun dama don Service immediately, ba tare da prior sanarwa ko alhaki, under namu sole discretion, don any reason whatsoever da ba tare da limitation, including amma not limited don a breach na Terms. If kai wish don terminate naka asusu, kai na iya simply discontinue ta amfani da Service. All provisions na Terms wacce ta nasu nature ya kamata survive termination shall survive termination, including, ba tare da limitation, ownership provisions, garanti disclaimers, indemnity da limitations na alhaki.

entries.source: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We will let you know via email and/or a prominent notice on our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update “effective date” at the top of this Privacy Policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
entries.value: Mu na iya update namu manufar sirri daga lokaci don lokaci. mu zai notify kai na any canje-canje ta posting the sabo manufar sirri a kan this shafi. mu zai let kai know via email da/or a prominent sanarwa a kan namu Service, prior don the change becoming effective da update “effective date” at the top na this manufar sirri. kai suna advised don bita this manufar sirri periodically don any canje-canje. canje-canje don this manufar sirri suna effective lokacin da su suna posted a kan this shafi.

entries.source: We may use remarketing services to advertise on third party websites to you after you visited our Service. We and our third-party vendors use cookies to inform, optimise and serve ads based on your past visits to our Service.
entries.value: Mu na iya amfani da remarketing services don advertise a kan third party websites don kai bayan kai visited namu Service. mu da namu third-party vendors amfani da cookies don inform, optimise da serve ads based a kan naka past visits don namu Service.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to automate the development process of our Service.
entries.value: Mu na iya amfani da third-party Service Providers don automate the development process na namu Service.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to monitor and analyze the use of our Service.
entries.value: Mu na iya amfani da third-party Service Providers don monitor da analyze the amfani da na namu Service.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to show advertisements to you to help support and maintain our Service.
entries.value: Mu na iya amfani da third-party Service Providers don show advertisements don kai don taimako tallafi da maintain namu Service.

entries.source: We reserve the right to withdraw or amend our Service, and any service or material we provide via Service, in our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason all or any part of Service is unavailable at any time or for any period. From time to time, we may restrict access to some parts of Service, or the entire Service, to users, including registered users.
entries.value: Mu reserve the daidai don withdraw ko amend namu Service, da any service ko material mu provide via Service, a cikin namu sole discretion ba tare da sanarwa. mu zai not be liable if don any reason all ko any part na Service shi ne unavailable at any lokaci ko don any period. daga lokaci don lokaci, mu na iya restrict samun dama don some parts na Service, ko the entire Service, don users, including registered users.

entries.source: We respect the intellectual property rights of others. It is our policy to respond to any claim that Content posted on Service infringes on the copyright or other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) of any person or entity. If you are a copyright owner, or authorized on behalf of one, and you believe that the copyrighted work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please submit your claim via email to support@inspir.app, with the subject line: “Copyright Infringement” and include in your claim a detailed description of the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” You may be held accountable for damages (including costs and attorneys’ fees) for misrepresentation or bad-faith claims on the infringement of any Content found on and/or through Service on your copyright.
entries.value: Mu respect the dukiyar basira haƙƙoƙi na others. Shi ne namu manufa don respond don any ikirari that abun ciki posted a kan Service infringes a kan the haƙƙa cikin mallaka ko other dukiyar basira haƙƙoƙi (“Infringement”) na any person ko entity. If kai suna a haƙƙa cikin mallaka owner, ko authorized a kan behalf na one, da kai believe that the copyrighted work has been copied a cikin a way that constitutes haƙƙa cikin mallaka infringement, please submit naka ikirari via email don support@inspir.app, tare da the fanni line: “haƙƙa cikin mallaka Infringement” da haɗa a cikin naka ikirari a detailed bayani na the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA sanarwa da Procedure don haƙƙa cikin mallaka Infringement ikirarai” kai na iya be held accountable don damages (including costs da attorneys’ fees) don misrepresentation ko bad-faith ikirarai a kan the infringement na any abun ciki found a kan da/or ta hanyar Service a kan naka haƙƙa cikin mallaka.

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: Mu amfani da cookies da similar tracking technologies don bibiyi the activity a kan namu Service da mu hold certain information. Cookies suna fayiloli tare da a small amount na bayanai wacce na iya haɗa an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies suna sent don naka browser daga a website da stored a kan naka device. Other tracking technologies suna also an yi amfani da such as beacons, tags da scripts don collect da bibiyi information da don inganta da analyze namu Service. kai can instruct naka browser don refuse all cookies ko don indicate lokacin da a cookie shi ne being sent. However, if kai kada a accept cookies, kai na iya not be able don amfani da some portions na namu Service. Examples na Cookies mu amfani da:zama Cookies: mu amfani da zama Cookies don operate namu Service. Preference Cookies: mu amfani da Preference Cookies don tuna naka preferences da various settings. tsaro Cookies: mu amfani da tsaro Cookies don tsaro purposes. talla Cookies: talla Cookies suna an yi amfani da don serve kai tare da advertisements that na iya be relevant don kai da naka interests.

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.
entries.value: Mu went outside namu planet. However, the most rapid da significant advancement ya kasance a cikin sadarwa da technology wacce has connected a global population na over 3 billion people.

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.
entries.value: Mu zai retain naka bayanan sirri only don as long as shi ne necessary don the purposes saita out a cikin this manufar sirri. mu zai retain da amfani da naka bayanan sirri don the extent necessary don comply tare da namu legal wajibai (don example, if mu suna ana buƙata don retain naka bayanai don comply tare da applicable laws), resolve disputes, da enforce namu legal yarjejeniyoyi da policies. mu zai also retain Usage bayanai don internal bincike purposes. Usage bayanai shi ne generally retained don a shorter period, except lokacin da this bayanai shi ne an yi amfani da don strengthen the tsaro ko don inganta the functionality na namu Service, ko mu suna legally obligated don retain this bayanai don longer lokaci periods.

Waɗannan Terms na Service (“Terms”, “Terms na Service”) govern naka amfani da na namu website located atwww.inspir.appand applications available a kan manhaja stores (together ko individually “Service”) operated ta Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). namu manufar sirri also governs naka amfani da na namu Service da explains yadda mu collect, safeguard da disclose information that results daga naka amfani da na namu web shafuka. manufar sirri shi ne available at inspir.manhaja/privacy naka yarjejeniya tare da mu includes these Terms da namu manufar sirri (“yarjejeniyoyi”). kai acknowledge that kai have karanta da understood the yarjejeniyoyi, da agree don be bound na su. If kai kada a agree tare da (ko cannot comply tare da) yarjejeniyoyi, sannan kai na iya not amfani da the Service, amma please let mu know ta emailing support@inspir.appso mu can gwada don find a solution. entries.source: When you create an account with us, you guarantee that the information you provide us is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Inaccurate, incomplete, or obsolete information may result in the immediate termination of your account on Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, including but not limited to the restriction of access to your computer and/or account. You agree to accept responsibility for any and all activities or actions that occur under your account and/or password, whether your password is with our Service or a third-party service. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account. You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity or that is not lawfully available for use, a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity other than you, without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar or obscene. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders in our sole discretion.
entries.value: Lokacin da kai ƙirƙiri an asusu tare da mu, kai guarantee that the information kai provide mu shi ne accurate, complete, da na yanzu at all times. Inaccurate, incomplete, ko obsolete information na iya result a cikin the immediate termination na naka asusu a kan Service. kai suna responsible don maintaining the sirri na naka asusu da kalmar sirri, including amma not limited don the restriction na samun dama don naka computer da/or asusu. kai agree don accept responsibility don any da all activities ko actions that occur under naka asusu da/or kalmar sirri, whether naka kalmar sirri shi ne tare da namu Service ko a third-party service. kai dole ne notify mu immediately upon becoming aware na any breach na tsaro ko unauthorized amfani da na naka asusu. kai na iya not amfani da as a username the name na another person ko entity ko that ba lawfully available don amfani da, a name ko trademark that shi ne fanni don any haƙƙoƙi na another person ko entity other fiye da kai, ba tare da appropriate authorization. kai na iya not amfani da as a username any name that shi ne offensive, vulgar ko obscene. mu reserve the daidai don refuse service, terminate asusu, remove ko edit abun ciki, ko cancel orders a cikin namu sole discretion.

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: Lokacin da kai paste bayanai zuwa AI, tambaya it don split broad ideas zuwa those jobs. Wani deck tare da 18 specific katuna shi ne usually mafi kyau fiye da a deck tare da 5 giant katuna that each contain a whole paragraph.

entries.source: While using our Service, we may also collect the following information: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence and actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details of documents on education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, information on bonuses and compensation, information on marital status, family members, social security (or other taxpayer identification) number, office location and other data. Payment Data. We may collect data necessary to process your payment if you make purchases, such as your payment instrument number (such as a credit card number), and the security code associated with your payment instrument. All payment data is stored by Razorpay. You may find their privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy
entries.value: While ta amfani da namu Service, mu na iya also collect the following information: sex, age, date na birth, place na birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place na residence da actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details na documents a kan education, qualification, professional training, employment yarjejeniyoyi, information a kan bonuses da compensation, information a kan marital status, family members, social tsaro (ko other taxpayer identification) number, office location da other bayanai. biyan kuɗi bayanai. mu na iya collect bayanai necessary don process naka biyan kuɗi if kai sa purchases, such as naka biyan kuɗi instrument number (such as a credit card number), da the tsaro lamba associated tare da naka biyan kuɗi instrument. All biyan kuɗi bayanai shi ne stored ta Razorpay. kai na iya find nasu privacy sanarwa haɗi(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy

entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address of Student and Parent First name and last name of Student and Parent Phone number of Student and Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies and Usage Data We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information that may interest you. You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.
entries.value: While ta amfani da namu Service, mu na iya tambaya kai don provide mu tare da certain personally identifiable information that can be an yi amfani da don contact ko identify kai (“bayanan sirri”). Personally identifiable information na iya haɗa, amma ba limited don: Email address na dalibi da uba ko uwa farko name da last name na dalibi da uba ko uwa Phone number na dalibi da uba ko uwa Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal lamba, City makaranta name Class Cookies da Usage bayanai mu na iya amfani da naka bayanai don contact kai tare da newsletters, marketing ko promotional materials da other information that na iya interest kai. kai na iya opt-out na receiving any, ko all, na these communications daga mu ta following the unsubscribe haɗi. Usage bayanai, mu na iya also collect information that naka browser sends whenever kai visit namu Service ko lokacin da kai samun dama Service ta ko ta hanyar any device (“Usage bayanai”). Wannan Usage bayanai na iya haɗa information such as naka computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the shafuka na namu Service that kai visit, the lokaci da date na naka visit, the lokaci spent a kan those shafuka, unique device identifiers da other diagnostic bayanai. lokacin da kai samun dama Service tare da a device, this Usage bayanai na iya haɗa information such as the type na device kai amfani da, naka device unique ID, the IP address na naka device, naka device operating system, the type na Internet browser kai amfani da, unique device identifiers da other diagnostic bayanai.

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: Duniya tarihi at all maki na lokaci has been like zooming out na a picture, Wani picture that kept changing. centuries leading up don the 19th century marked a turning point a cikin human tarihi, as the duniya moved daga a flat, limited duba na the duniya don a growing fahimta na sabo territories da colonies. French Revolution marked the farko lokaci lokacin da a large population gathered don protest da establish the ideals na liberty, equality, da fraternity. events na duniya War II also shaped the duniya don the na gaba century da laid the foundation don the 21st century.

entries.source: Yes, but the recommended workflow is hint-first. Use it to understand the method, check your work, and review errors instead of copying a final answer.
entries.value: Yes, amma the recommended tsarin aiki shi ne alama-farko. amfani da it don fahimci the method, bincika naka work, da bita errors maimakon copying a final amsa.

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: Eh, idan yana ba da alamomi, yana duba tunani, yana bayyana kuskure, kuma yana neman ka samar da amsar karshe maimakon ya rubuta maka ita.

entries.source: Yes. {value1} opens as a public guest learning mode at {value2}, so you can start with a few free guest messages before creating an account.
entries.value: Yes. {value1} opens as a na jama’a guest yanayin koyo at {value2}, don haka kai can fara tare da a few kyauta guest messages kafin creating an asusu.

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Yes. Wani good tsarin aiki shi ne don koyi the foundation daga a trusted lesson tushe, sannan amfani da inspir don tambaya follow-up tambayoyi, yi atisaye tunawa, gyara rashin fahimta, da tsara abin da don bita na gaba.

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Yes. Wani makaranta can begin ta testing na jama’a modes, sannan move toward a pilot ko tailored tura aiki lokacin da the amfani da case, abun ciki yana buƙatar, da funding path suna bayyananne.

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Yes. masu amfani shafuka haɗi only don yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a, jagorori, saƙonnin farawa, hanyoyin koyo, da AI-mai karantawa fayilolin ganowa. hirarrakin sirri da aka adana remain excluded.

entries.source: Yes. Category pages link into public guest modes, learning paths, and article clusters so learners can move from reading into tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, or feedback.
entries.value: Yes. rukuni shafuka haɗi zuwa yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a, hanyoyin koyo, da kasida rukuni don haka masu koyo can move daga karatu zuwa tutoring, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, muhawara, tsarawa, ko martani.

entries.source: Yes. Code Tutor can explain concepts, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you practice without turning learning into copy-paste.
entries.value: Yes. lamba malami can bayyana ra’ayoyi, walk ta hanyar examples, tambaya kai don predict hali, da taimako kai atisaye ba tare da turning learning zuwa kwafe-paste.

entries.source: Yes. Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with practice and review.
entries.value: Yes. shirin jarabawa mai tsarawa can turn naka batutuwa, date, da available lokaci zuwa a mai amfani bita sequence tare da atisaye da bita.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Yes. yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a let malamai gwada learning hali kafin discussing a na musamman tura aiki.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Yes. yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a such as koyi Anything, aikin gida koci, Socratic Instruction, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, da rubutu martani bude directly.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Yes. yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a such as koyi Anything, Socratic Instruction, aikin gida koci, tambayoyi, da katunan tunatarwa bude directly daga canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.

entries.source: Yes. Public mode URLs open directly in guest mode so a learner can start immediately, then create an account later if they want saved history or more usage.
entries.value: Yes. na jama’a mode URLs bude directly a cikin yanayin baƙo don haka a mai koyo can fara immediately, sannan ƙirƙiri an asusu daga baya if su want saved tarihi ko ƙarin usage.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Yes. na jama’a modes work don makaranta batutuwa, professional skills, rubuta lamba, bincike, projects, da sirri karatu routines.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: Eh. Hirarrakin batutuwan jama'a kamar Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, tambayoyin gwaji, da katunan tuna suna budewa kai tsaye a yanayin bako.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Yes. na jama’a batu wuraren shiga such as /chat/learn-anything da /chat/socratic-instruction suna intended don be mai iya shiga index learning shafuka.

entries.source: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are public modes designed for active recall and mistake repair.
entries.value: Yes. tambayoyi, katin tunatarwa mai gina, da bita da tazara suna na jama’a modes designed don tunawa mai aiki da kuskure gyara.

entries.source: Yes. Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask questions, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting evidence.
entries.value: Yes. karatu Companion can simplify passages, tambaya tambayoyi, bayyana kalmomi, da taimako kai identify the main ikirari da supporting shaida.
